pkgmetadata.longdescription: Storage-pyPython Client library to interact with Supabase Storage. How to useAs it takes some effort to get the headers. We suggest that you use the storage functionality through the main [Supabase Python Client](httpsgithub.comsupabase-communitysupabase-py)python3from storage3 import create_clienturl httpsyour_supabase_id.supabase.costoragev1key your api keyheaders {apiKey key, Authorization fBearer {key}} pass in is_asyncTrue to create an async clientstorage_client create_client(url, headers, is_asyncFalse)storage_client.list_buckets()
